evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system.

evidence.claim: Built document ingestion pipeline using chunking, OpenAI embeddings, and Pinecone
evidence.source_text: Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone)

evidence.claim: Implemented answer-generation layer using GPT-4 and fine-tuned smaller models
evidence.source_text: the answer-generation layer (initially GPT-4, then a fine-tuned smaller model for cost control).

evidence.claim: Designed evaluation framework using BLEU, ROUGE, and human-in-the-loop scores
evidence.source_text: Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) and human-in-the-loop quality scores.

evidence.claim: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: 5.4 years of experience building ML-powered features in production
evidence.source_text: Machine learning engineer with 5.4 years of experience building ML-powered features in production.

evidence.claim: Maintained recommendation system for discovery feed for 18 months
evidence.source_text: Recently, my main project for the last 18 months has been the recommendation system that powers our discovery feed.

evidence.claim: Self-directed learning through shipping real systems
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
I've spent enough time debugging production ranking issues to know which signals matter and which are noise.

evidence.claim: Technical proficiency in Diffusion Models, Embeddings, NLP, Kafka, Speech Recognition, MLflow, BM25, Sentence Transformers, Go, CNN, Pinecone, scikit-learn, FAISS, BentoML, RAG, QLoRA
